title: Kordisen Non Stick Induction Wok Pan, 30cm Deep Stir-Fry Pans with Lid, Stay Cool Handle, Compatible with All Stovetops, PFOA Free
features: 【Granite Non-Stick Coating】- This wok features a non-stick granite coating on its interior, ensuring a 100% PFOA-free, smokeless, safe, and healthy cooking experience. Enjoy cooking with minimal oil for a healthier diet

【All Stove Compatible】- The stir fry pan skillet is designed with a high magnetic conductive stainless steel base, making it compatible with all types of stovetops, including induction. The advanced die-casting aluminum technology prevents warping, ensures quick and even heat distribution, and saves you time and energy in the kitchen

【Ergonomic Handle & Glass Lid】- The bakelite handle provides a comfortable and ergonomic grip while staying cool during cooking. The see-through glass lid allows you to monitor the cooking progress while locking in the flavors

【Multi-purpose Wok Pan】- This deep and spacious stir fry pan has a diameter of 12 inches and a height of 3.7 inches, making it suitable for serving 3-6 people. It meets all your cooking needs, including sautéing, stir-frying, boiling, braising, searing, and steaming

【Quick & Easy Cleaning】- The rivet-free, non stick surface makes cleanup effortless—just wipe with warm soapy water Designed for busy kitchens, this non stick frying pan wok saves time after every meal
description: Product Description Why Choose KORDISEN Nonstick Wok？ This granite coating is very non stick, so you can make a delicious meal with less oil. It is very easy to clean, you don't need a dishwasher, just wipe it with a tissue or rinse it with water, which not only makes cooking easier but also more enjoyable Compared with the traditional Non-stick surface, our wok heats faster, saving us more time from waiting and making daily cooking easier. PFOA free, smokeless, safe & healthy. Previous page Next page 1 HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL 2 NON-STICK COATING GLASS UPPER COVER Tempered explosion-proof glass, which has good thermal stability. Easy to know the state of the food. COVER HANDLE DESIGN Anti-scalding cover head, easy to hold and put. Spatula can be placed when using. SOMOOTH SURFACE OF THE WOK Fast cooking and heat evenly. Clean with a gentle wipe, easy to care for. ANTI-SCALD WOOD HANDLE Bakelite handle for a comfortable grip. Heat-resistant handle, with a maximum temperature of 302℉. Is the wok dishwasher-safe? Yes, this wok is dishwasher-safe, making cleaning a breeze after use. Can I use this wok on an induction cooktop? Yes, this wok is compatible with induction cooktops, as well as gas, electric, and ceramic stoves. Is the non-stick coating PFOA-free? Yes, the non-stick coating used in this wok is PFOA-free, ensuring safe and healthy cooking. Can I use metal utensils with this wok? It is recommended to use silicone, nylon, or wooden utensils to prolong the life of the non-stick coating.
